tag.name: codex_paid_click_intent_v1_receiver_no_send
tag.notes:
Mode B. Stores Google click id in browser storage and calls no-write/no-send receiver only. No conversion send.
2026-05-21 Codex Preview: preserve gad_campaignid/gad_source in paid click evidence and refresh landing_url on new Google evidence. No conversion send.

trigger.name: codex_paid_click_intent_v1_all_pages_guarded
trigger.notes: All Pages trigger. Client-side guard only sends receiver payload when Google click id exists; admin/internal paths are skipped.

updatedTag.name: codex_paid_click_intent_v1_receiver_no_send
updatedTag.notes:
Mode B. Stores Google click id in browser storage and calls no-write/no-send receiver only. No conversion send.
2026-05-21 Codex Preview: preserve gad_campaignid/gad_source in paid click evidence and refresh landing_url on new Google evidence. No conversion send.
2026-05-21 Codex Preview: v3 ignores stale stored Google click id types when current URL has a fresh Google click id. No conversion send.
